tweets.author: @OpenAI
tweets.text:
Helping AI reach more people requires deep collaboration across the ecosystem.

Today we’re announcing new investment, with support from @SoftBank, @NVIDIA, and @Amazon, to scale the infrastructure needed to bring AI to everyone.

https://t.co/xW0ItgMTLe

tweets.author: @MarkJCarney
tweets.text:
Team Canada is here on a mission.

Premiers, Ministers, and I were in Mumbai working to double our trade with India, secure energy partnerships, and attract massive new investment — to build a stronger, more resilient Canadian economy. https://t.co/EdLf81yrO0

tweets.author: @CanadianPM
tweets.text: Prime Minister Carney is in Mumbai to forge new partnerships, diversify Canada’s trade, and attract new investment. https://t.co/wzCYd0myNV

tweets.author: @cspotweet
tweets.text:
New investment in Alberta's renewables industry plunged 99% from 2023 to 2025.

But given our fiscal woes, should the UCP do more to entice new $$$ in our ample wind and sun?

More on why Alberta would benefit from fixing this policy in 2026.

https://t.co/fFXwqFSrKO

tweets.author: @coinbureau
tweets.text:
🚨BREAKING: OPENAI ANNOUNCES $730B PRE-MONEY VALUATION

OpenAI has officially announced $110 billion in new investment at a $730 billion pre-money valuation, marking one of the largest private funding rounds in tech history.

tweets.text: *OPENAI TO RAISE $110B IN NEW INVESTMENT AT $730B VALUATION https://t.co/bK95vluzz2

tweets.author: @TnInvestment
tweets.text:
🌟🌟New Investment expected 🌟🌟

#TamilNadu : Union Textiles Ministry on Saturday said 190.44 acres of Industrial land have been allotted to 23 investors by the Board of Directors of PM MITRA Park in #Virudhunagar

- This will bring committed investments of nearly Rs 2,192.21 Cr with a potential for generating 15,000 jobs

- Textile park is located right on the National Highway NH 44 and just 106 km away from #Thoothukudi VOC port

#InvestInTN | #Chennai | #SIPCOT 

https://t.co/6vsDt1PuaD

tweets.author: @ANI
tweets.text: Prime Minister of Canada, Mark Carney tweets, "Team Canada is here on a mission. Premiers, Ministers, and I were in Mumbai working to double our trade with India, secure energy partnerships, and attract massive new investment — to build a stronger, more resilient Canadian economy."
